requirement_topic.en: Hazardous Substances / Materials Restriction (Brazil vs RoHS)
requirement_topic.zh: 有害物质/材料限制（巴西 vs RoHS）
requirement_topic.zht: 有害物質/材料限制（巴西 vs RoHS）

summary.en: Brazil does not operate a single horizontal RoHS-style restriction directive for electrical and electronic equipment equivalent to EU Directive 2011/65/EU. Restrictions on hazardous substances in Brazil arise from sectoral instruments: PNRS (Política Nacional de Resíduos Sólidos, Law 12.305/2010) and its reverse-logistics obligations for lamps containing mercury; CONAMA environmental resolutions; and ANVISA/IBAMA chemical controls where relevant. INMETRO certification under Portaria INMETRO 389/2021 focuses on electrical safety and performance rather than a 10-substance homogeneous-material restriction. Mercury-containing lamps are subject to reverse-logistics/take-back obligations; modern LED products are generally mercury-free by design, which supports compliance with those obligations. Manufacturers should verify the current sectoral requirements applicable to the specific materials used.
summary.zh: 巴西没有针对电气电子设备的单一横向 RoHS 式限制指令，与欧盟指令 2011/65/EU 不同。巴西对有害物质的限制来自分部门工具：PNRS（国家固体废物政策，第 12.305/2010 号法律）及其对含汞灯具的逆向物流义务；CONAMA 环境决议；以及在相关时的 ANVISA/IBAMA 化学品管控。依据 Portaria INMETRO 389/2021 的 INMETRO 认证侧重电气安全和性能，而非对均质材料的 10 项物质限制。含汞灯具须遵守逆向物流/回收义务；现代 LED 产品在设计上通常不含汞，有助于符合上述义务。制造商应核验适用于所用具体材料的现行分部门要求。
summary.zht: 巴西沒有針對電氣電子設備的單一橫向 RoHS 式限制指令，與歐盟指令 2011/65/EU 不同。巴西對有害物質的限制來自分部門工具：PNRS（國家固體廢物政策，第 12.305/2010 號法律）及其對含汞燈具的逆向物流義務；CONAMA 環境決議；以及在相關時的 ANVISA/IBAMA 化學品管控。依據 Portaria INMETRO 389/2021 的 INMETRO 認證側重電氣安全和性能，而非對均質材料的 10 項物質限制。含汞燈具須遵守逆向物流/回收義務；現代 LED 產品在設計上通常不含汞，有助於符合上述義務。製造商應核驗適用於所用具體材料的現行分部門要求。

standards_or_laws: Lei 12.305/2010 (PNRS — Política Nacional de Resíduos Sólidos) — reverse-logistics obligations including mercury-containing lamps (Brazil)
CONAMA resolutions / IBAMA-ANVISA chemical controls — sectoral hazardous-substance instruments (Brazil)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB/T 26572-2011 (Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in electrical and electronic products), covering the original 6 RoHS substances (Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr(VI), PBB, PBDE) with the same concentration thresholds as EU RoHS. China RoHS 2 (Management Measures for the Restriction of the Use of Hazardous Substances in Electrical and Electronic Products, SJ/T 11364-2014) requires a hazardous substance disclosure label (orange for contains substances above threshold / green for below threshold) on EEE products sold in China. As of 2026, the 4 phthalates (DEHP, BBP, DBP, DIBP) added by EU Directive 2015/863 are not yet in the CN mandatory restricted list under GB/T 26572.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB/T 26572-2011（电子电气产品中限用物质的限量要求），涵盖原 6 项 RoHS 物质（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE），浓度限值与欧盟 RoHS 相同。中国 RoHS 2（电子电气产品有害物质限制使用管理办法，SJ/T 11364-2014）要求在中国销售的 EEE 产品上贴附有害物质披露标识（含量超过限值为橙色/低于限值为绿色）。截至 2026 年，欧盟指令 2015/863 新增的 4 项邻苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP）尚未纳入中国 GB/T 26572 强制限制清单。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB/T 26572-2011（電子電氣產品中限用物質的限量要求），涵蓋原 6 項 RoHS 物質（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE），濃度限值與歐盟 RoHS 相同。中國 RoHS 2（電子電氣產品有害物質限制使用管理辦法，SJ/T 11364-2014）要求在中國銷售的 EEE 產品上貼附有害物質披露標識（含量超過限值為橙色/低於限值為綠色）。截至 2026 年，歐盟指令 2015/863 新增的 4 項鄰苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP）尚未納入中國 GB/T 26572 強制限制清單。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 26572-2011 — Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in EEE (SAC/SAMR — covers original 6 substances)
SJ/T 11364-2014 — Marking for the restricted use of hazardous substances in electronic and electrical products (China RoHS 2 disclosure label)

gap.en: Unlike the EU, Brazil does not condition market access on a 10-substance homogeneous-material restriction, so there is no direct Brazilian RoHS test certificate required for INMETRO certification. The practical differences versus China: (1) China requires the China RoHS 2 disclosure label (GB/T 26572 / SJ/T 11364) for the CN market — this CN label is not required in Brazil; (2) Brazil instead imposes reverse-logistics/take-back obligations under the PNRS (Law 12.305/2010), most directly relevant for mercury-containing lamps — LED products are generally mercury-free, but importers should confirm participation in any applicable reverse-logistics system; (3) sectoral chemical controls (CONAMA/IBAMA/ANVISA) may apply to specific materials. Manufacturers should not assume EU-RoHS or CN-RoHS compliance automatically satisfies Brazilian obligations, and should map the specific materials against the applicable Brazilian sectoral instruments and any reverse-logistics enrolment.
gap.zh: 与欧盟不同，巴西不以对均质材料的 10 项物质限制作为市场准入条件，因此 INMETRO 认证不要求直接的巴西 RoHS 检测证书。与中国的实际差异：（1）中国市场要求中国 RoHS 2 披露标识（GB/T 26572 / SJ/T 11364）——该中国标识在巴西不要求；（2）巴西转而依据 PNRS（第 12.305/2010 号法律）施加逆向物流/回收义务，最直接适用于含汞灯具——LED 产品通常不含汞，但进口商应确认参与任何适用的逆向物流系统；（3）分部门化学品管控（CONAMA/IBAMA/ANVISA）可能适用于特定材料。制造商不应假定欧盟 RoHS 或中国 RoHS 合规自动满足巴西义务，并应将具体材料对照适用的巴西分部门工具及任何逆向物流登记进行梳理。
gap.zht: 與歐盟不同，巴西不以對均質材料的 10 項物質限制作為市場准入條件，因此 INMETRO 認證不要求直接的巴西 RoHS 檢測證書。與中國的實際差異：（1）中國市場要求中國 RoHS 2 披露標識（GB/T 26572 / SJ/T 11364）——該中國標識在巴西不要求；（2）巴西轉而依據 PNRS（第 12.305/2010 號法律）施加逆向物流/回收義務，最直接適用於含汞燈具——LED 產品通常不含汞，但進口商應確認參與任何適用的逆向物流系統；（3）分部門化學品管控（CONAMA/IBAMA/ANVISA）可能適用於特定材料。製造商不應假定歐盟 RoHS 或中國 RoHS 合規自動滿足巴西義務，並應將具體材料對照適用的巴西分部門工具及任何逆向物流登記進行梳理。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional / sectoral — Brazil has no horizontal RoHS-style EEE substance restriction; obligations arise from the PNRS reverse-logistics regime (Law 12.305/2010, mercury-containing lamps) and sectoral chemical controls, not from a 10-substance market-access test
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (disclosure) — China RoHS 2 hazardous substance disclosure label required; GB/T 26572 covers 6 original substances; 4 phthalates not yet in CN mandatory list as of 2026

source.publisher: Ministério do Meio Ambiente (MMA) / PNRS — Política Nacional de Resíduos Sólidos

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Brazil has no single horizontal RoHS-style substance restriction for EEE as a market-access condition; instead, reverse-logistics obligations under the PNRS (Law 12.305/2010, most relevant for mercury-containing lamps) and sectoral chemical controls apply. The China RoHS 2 disclosure label (GB/T 26572 / SJ/T 11364) is a CN-market requirement not needed in Brazil. LED products are generally mercury-free, but importers should map the specific materials against applicable Brazilian sectoral instruments and confirm any reverse-logistics enrolment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴西没有作为市场准入条件的单一横向 RoHS 式 EEE 物质限制；而是适用 PNRS（第 12.305/2010 号法律，最相关于含汞灯具）下的逆向物流义务及分部门化学品管控。中国 RoHS 2 披露标识（GB/T 26572 / SJ/T 11364）为中国市场要求，在巴西不需要。LED 产品通常不含汞，但进口商应将具体材料对照适用的巴西分部门工具进行梳理，并确认任何逆向物流登记。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴西沒有作為市場准入條件的單一橫向 RoHS 式 EEE 物質限制；而是適用 PNRS（第 12.305/2010 號法律，最相關於含汞燈具）下的逆向物流義務及分部門化學品管控。中國 RoHS 2 披露標識（GB/T 26572 / SJ/T 11364）為中國市場要求，在巴西不需要。LED 產品通常不含汞，但進口商應將具體材料對照適用的巴西分部門工具進行梳理，並確認任何逆向物流登記。

requirement_topic.en: Reverse Logistics / Extended Producer Responsibility (PNRS Law 12.305/2010) vs CN Chemical Regulations
requirement_topic.zh: 逆向物流/生产者延伸责任（PNRS 第 12.305/2010 号法律）与中国化学品法规
requirement_topic.zht: 逆向物流/生產者延伸責任（PNRS 第 12.305/2010 號法律）與中國化學品法規

summary.en: Brazil's PNRS (Política Nacional de Resíduos Sólidos, Lei 12.305/2010) establishes Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR) and shared reverse-logistics obligations for certain product categories, including lamps. Manufacturers, importers, distributors, and retailers placing in-scope lighting products on the Brazilian market may be required to participate in a reverse-logistics system for collection and environmentally sound disposal/recycling of end-of-life lamps. The obligation is ongoing (not a one-time test) and is administered through sectoral agreements (acordos setoriais) and CONAMA/MMA instruments. The responsible Brazilian legal entity (typically the CNPJ importer/representative) must enrol in or contribute to an applicable reverse-logistics scheme where required. This is an ongoing market-conduct obligation rather than a product-conformity test.
summary.zh: 巴西 PNRS（国家固体废物政策，第 12.305/2010 号法律）为包括灯具在内的某些产品类别确立了生产者延伸责任（EPR）及共担逆向物流义务。将适用照明产品投放巴西市场的制造商、进口商、经销商和零售商可能须参与逆向物流系统，以收集并对报废灯具进行环境无害化处置/回收。该义务是持续性的（非一次性测试），并通过部门协议（acordos setoriais）及 CONAMA/MMA 工具管理。负责的巴西法律实体（通常为 CNPJ 进口商/代表）须在要求时加入或资助适用的逆向物流方案。这是持续性的市场行为义务，而非产品合格性测试。
summary.zht: 巴西 PNRS（國家固體廢物政策，第 12.305/2010 號法律）為包括燈具在內的某些產品類別確立了生產者延伸責任（EPR）及共擔逆向物流義務。將適用照明產品投放巴西市場的製造商、進口商、經銷商和零售商可能須參與逆向物流系統，以收集並對報廢燈具進行環境無害化處置/回收。該義務是持續性的（非一次性測試），並通過部門協議（acordos setoriais）及 CONAMA/MMA 工具管理。負責的巴西法律實體（通常為 CNPJ 進口商/代表）須在要求時加入或資助適用的逆向物流方案。這是持續性的市場行為義務，而非產品合格性測試。

standards_or_laws: Lei 12.305/2010 (PNRS — Política Nacional de Resíduos Sólidos) — Extended Producer Responsibility and reverse-logistics obligations (Brazil)
Decreto 10.936/2022 — regulates the PNRS, including reverse-logistics systems (Brazil)

summary.en: China does not have a direct equivalent to a single horizontal EPR/reverse-logistics obligation for lamps imposed as a market-conduct duty in the same structure. The closest CN instruments are: MEP (Ministry of Ecology and Environment) Order No. 12 (2010, revised) on new chemical substance registration; GB 30981-2020 (Rules for the classification and labelling of chemicals) for hazardous chemicals labelling; and the Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances (MEE Order 12, 2020). None of these create an obligation to enrol in a product take-back/reverse-logistics scheme equivalent to the Brazilian PNRS for lighting products.
summary.zh: 中国没有以相同结构、作为市场行为义务对灯具施加的单一横向 EPR/逆向物流义务的直接对应。最接近的中国法规工具包括：生态环境部（MEP）令第 12 号（2010 年，经修订）关于新化学物质登记；GB 30981-2020（化学品分类和标签规则）用于危险化学品标签；以及《新化学物质环境管理登记办法》（生态环境部令第 12 号，2020 年）。上述均未产生与巴西 PNRS 对照明产品相当的、加入产品回收/逆向物流方案的义务。
summary.zht: 中國沒有以相同結構、作為市場行為義務對燈具施加的單一橫向 EPR/逆向物流義務的直接對應。最接近的中國法規工具包括：生態環境部（MEP）令第 12 號（2010 年，經修訂）關於新化學物質登記；GB 30981-2020（化學品分類和標籤規則）用於危險化學品標籤；以及《新化學物質環境管理登記辦法》（生態環境部令第 12 號，2020 年）。上述均未產生與巴西 PNRS 對照明產品相當的、加入產品回收/逆向物流方案的義務。

standards_or_laws: MEE Order No. 12 (2020) — Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances (China)
GB 30981-2020 — Rules for the classification and labelling of chemicals (China)

gap.en: Brazil's PNRS reverse-logistics/EPR obligation is an ongoing market-conduct duty with no direct CN equivalent for lighting products. Chinese LED luminaire manufacturers and their Brazilian importers must: (1) determine whether the specific product falls within an applicable reverse-logistics scheme/sectoral agreement for lamps; (2) enrol in or contribute to the scheme through the CNPJ-holding responsible entity where required; (3) maintain compliance over time (collection targets, reporting), not a one-time action. This contrasts with the EU comparison, where the analogous ongoing obligation is REACH SVHC tracking; in Brazil the dominant ongoing obligation for lighting is reverse logistics under the PNRS. The CNPJ importer/representative is the legally responsible party before Brazilian authorities. Verify current sectoral agreements and Decreto 10.936/2022 implementation for the specific product category.
gap.zh: 巴西 PNRS 逆向物流/EPR 义务是持续性的市场行为义务，对照明产品无直接中国对应。中国 LED 灯具制造商及其巴西进口商须：（1）确定具体产品是否落入适用于灯具的逆向物流方案/部门协议；（2）在要求时通过持有 CNPJ 的责任实体加入或资助该方案；（3）持续维持合规（收集目标、报告），而非一次性行为。这与欧盟对照不同——欧盟类似的持续性义务是 REACH SVHC 跟踪；在巴西，照明的主要持续性义务是 PNRS 下的逆向物流。CNPJ 进口商/代表是在巴西当局面前的法律责任方。请核查具体产品类别的现行部门协议及 Decreto 10.936/2022 的实施。
gap.zht: 巴西 PNRS 逆向物流/EPR 義務是持續性的市場行為義務，對照明產品無直接中國對應。中國 LED 燈具製造商及其巴西進口商須：（1）確定具體產品是否落入適用於燈具的逆向物流方案/部門協議；（2）在要求時通過持有 CNPJ 的責任實體加入或資助該方案；（3）持續維持合規（收集目標、報告），而非一次性行為。這與歐盟對照不同——歐盟類似的持續性義務是 REACH SVHC 跟蹤；在巴西，照明的主要持續性義務是 PNRS 下的逆向物流。CNPJ 進口商/代表是在巴西當局面前的法律責任方。請核查具體產品類別的現行部門協議及 Decreto 10.936/2022 的實施。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where applicable — Extended Producer Responsibility / reverse-logistics enrolment under PNRS (Law 12.305/2010, Decreto 10.936/2022) for in-scope lighting products; ongoing market-conduct obligation held by the CNPJ responsible entity
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent — no horizontal product take-back/reverse-logistics obligation equivalent to the Brazilian PNRS exists for lighting products in China as of 2026

source.publisher: Presidência da República — Casa Civil (Diário Oficial da União)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Brazil's PNRS (Law 12.305/2010, regulated by Decreto 10.936/2022) imposes Extended Producer Responsibility and reverse-logistics obligations that may apply to in-scope lighting products — an ongoing market-conduct duty with no direct CN equivalent. The CNPJ importer/representative is the legally responsible party and must enrol in or contribute to an applicable scheme where required. Manufacturers should verify current sectoral agreements for the specific product category rather than assuming exemption.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴西 PNRS（第 12.305/2010 号法律，由 Decreto 10.936/2022 规范）施加生产者延伸责任及逆向物流义务，可能适用于适用照明产品——这是持续性市场行为义务，无直接中国对应。CNPJ 进口商/代表为法律责任方，须在要求时加入或资助适用方案。制造商应核查具体产品类别的现行部门协议，而非假定豁免。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴西 PNRS（第 12.305/2010 號法律，由 Decreto 10.936/2022 規範）施加生產者延伸責任及逆向物流義務，可能適用於適用照明產品——這是持續性市場行為義務，無直接中國對應。CNPJ 進口商/代表為法律責任方，須在要求時加入或資助適用方案。製造商應核查具體產品類別的現行部門協議，而非假定豁免。

requirement_topic.en: INMETRO Certification Overall Process and Technical Dossier vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zh: INMETRO 认证整体流程与技术档案 vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zht: INMETRO 認證整體流程與技術檔案 vs CCC / CQC

summary.en: INMETRO compulsory certification for LED lamps/luminaires in Brazil requires: (1) Engage an accredited certification body (OCP — Organismo de Certificação de Produtos) operating under INMETRO accreditation; (2) Type-test the product at an accredited laboratory to the applicable ABNT NBR IEC standards (e.g., ABNT NBR IEC 60598-1 for luminaires, ABNT NBR IEC 62560 for self-ballasted LED lamps, ABNT NBR IEC 62612 for performance); (3) Undergo factory/quality-system assessment where the certification model requires it; (4) Register the certified product with INMETRO and obtain the INMETRO registration number; (5) Apply the INMETRO compliance identification (Selo de Identificação da Conformidade) on the product/packaging; (6) Appoint an in-country importer or representative holding a Brazilian CNPJ, who holds the certificate and is responsible before INMETRO; (7) Meet PBE/ENCE energy-labelling and, for wireless products, ANATEL homologation. Goods clear customs via the importer; main entry ports include Santos and Paranaguá, with transport governed by ANTT for road logistics.
summary.zh: 巴西 LED 灯/灯具的 INMETRO 强制认证要求：（1）委托在 INMETRO 认可下运作的经认可认证机构（OCP——产品认证机构）；（2）在认可实验室按适用 ABNT NBR IEC 标准对产品进行型式试验（如灯具用 ABNT NBR IEC 60598-1、自镇流 LED 灯用 ABNT NBR IEC 62560、性能用 ABNT NBR IEC 62612）；（3）在认证模式要求时接受工厂/质量体系评估；（4）将获证产品在 INMETRO 注册并取得 INMETRO 注册号；（5）在产品/包装上加贴 INMETRO 合规标识（Selo de Identificação da Conformidade）；（6）指定持有巴西 CNPJ 的在地进口商或代表，由其持证并在 INMETRO 面前负责；（7）满足 PBE/ENCE 能效标签，无线产品还须取得 ANATEL 型号核准。货物通过进口商清关；主要入境港口包括 Santos 和 Paranaguá，公路物流由 ANTT 管理。
summary.zht: 巴西 LED 燈/燈具的 INMETRO 強制認證要求：（1）委託在 INMETRO 認可下運作的經認可認證機構（OCP——產品認證機構）；（2）在認可實驗室按適用 ABNT NBR IEC 標準對產品進行型式試驗（如燈具用 ABNT NBR IEC 60598-1、自鎮流 LED 燈用 ABNT NBR IEC 62560、性能用 ABNT NBR IEC 62612）；（3）在認證模式要求時接受工廠/質量體系評估；（4）將獲證產品在 INMETRO 注冊並取得 INMETRO 注冊號；（5）在產品/包裝上加貼 INMETRO 合規標識（Selo de Identificação da Conformidade）；（6）指定持有巴西 CNPJ 的在地進口商或代表，由其持證並在 INMETRO 面前負責；（7）滿足 PBE/ENCE 能效標籤，無線產品還須取得 ANATEL 型號核准。貨物通過進口商清關；主要入境港口包括 Santos 和 Paranaguá，公路物流由 ANTT 管理。

standards_or_laws: Portaria INMETRO 389/2021 — Compulsory conformity assessment for LED lamps and luminaires (Brazil)
ABNT NBR IEC 60598-1 / ABNT NBR IEC 62560 / ABNT NBR IEC 62612 — applicable safety and performance standards (Brazil)
ANATEL Resolution 715/2019 — homologation for wireless-enabled products (Brazil)

summary.en: In China, the primary mandatory certification for luminaires sold in the residential market is CCC (China Compulsory Certification), administered by CNCA (Certification and Accreditation Administration of China). CCC requires mandatory third-party certification by a CNCA-authorized certification body (e.g., CQC — China Quality Certification Centre). CQC voluntary certification is also available for products not covered by mandatory CCC. For wireless-enabled luminaires (e.g., smart LED with Wi-Fi/Bluetooth), SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission) type approval is additionally required in China. CCC certification bodies are not recognised for Brazilian INMETRO certification purposes.
summary.zh: 在中国，面向居民市场销售灯具的主要强制认证为中国强制性产品认证（CCC），由中国国家认证认可监督管理委员会（CNCA）管理。CCC 要求由 CNCA 授权认证机构（如中国质量认证中心 CQC）进行强制性第三方认证。对于非强制 CCC 范畴的产品，CQC 自愿性认证亦可申请。对于集成无线功能的灯具（如具备 Wi-Fi/蓝牙的智能 LED），在中国还须取得国家无线电管理委员会（SRRC）型号核准。CCC 认证机构不被巴西 INMETRO 认证目的所认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，面向居民市場銷售燈具的主要強制認證為中國強制性產品認證（CCC），由中國國家認證認可監督管理委員會（CNCA）管理。CCC 要求由 CNCA 授權認證機構（如中國質量認證中心 CQC）進行強制性第三方認證。對於非強制 CCC 範疇的產品，CQC 自願性認證亦可申請。對於集成無線功能的燈具（如具備 Wi-Fi/藍牙的智能 LED），在中國還須取得國家無線電管理委員會（SRRC）型號核准。CCC 認證機構不被巴西 INMETRO 認證目的所認可。

standards_or_laws: CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires (CNCA/CQC)
SRRC type approval — required for wireless-enabled luminaires in China

gap.en: Brazil's INMETRO/OCP model and China's CCC are both mandatory third-party certification schemes, so the structure is closer to China than to the EU self-declaration route — but they are fully non-mutual, requiring separate certification, test reports, and registration for each market. Key Brazil-specific requirements with no CN equivalent: (1) certification by an INMETRO-accredited OCP with testing to ABNT NBR IEC editions at an INMETRO-recognised laboratory — CN CCC reports are not transferable; (2) a mandatory in-country importer/representative holding a Brazilian CNPJ who holds the certificate and is legally responsible before INMETRO; (3) INMETRO product registration and the compliance identification seal; (4) products rated/marked for the 127/220 V, 60 Hz grid; (5) PBE/ENCE energy labelling and Selo PROCEL (Eletrobras); (6) ANATEL homologation for wireless products; (7) PNRS reverse-logistics obligations. The customs and logistics chain (entry via Santos/Paranaguá, ANTT-regulated road transport) is handled by the Brazilian importer.
gap.zh: 巴西 INMETRO/OCP 模式与中国 CCC 均为强制性第三方认证方案，因此其结构较欧盟自我声明路径更接近中国——但两者完全互不相认，须为各市场分别进行认证、检测报告及注册。主要巴西特有要求（无中国对应）：（1）由 INMETRO 认可的 OCP 认证，并在 INMETRO 认可实验室按 ABNT NBR IEC 版本检测——中国 CCC 报告不可转用；（2）强制要求持有巴西 CNPJ 的在地进口商/代表持证，并在 INMETRO 面前承担法律责任；（3）INMETRO 产品注册及合规标识；（4）产品须按 127/220 V、60 Hz 电网标定/标志；（5）PBE/ENCE 能效标签及 Selo PROCEL（Eletrobras）；（6）无线产品的 ANATEL 型号核准；（7）PNRS 逆向物流义务。海关及物流链（经 Santos/Paranaguá 入境、ANTT 监管的公路运输）由巴西进口商处理。
gap.zht: 巴西 INMETRO/OCP 模式與中國 CCC 均為強制性第三方認證方案，因此其結構較歐盟自我聲明路徑更接近中國——但兩者完全互不相認，須為各市場分別進行認證、檢測報告及注冊。主要巴西特有要求（無中國對應）：（1）由 INMETRO 認可的 OCP 認證，並在 INMETRO 認可實驗室按 ABNT NBR IEC 版本檢測——中國 CCC 報告不可轉用；（2）強制要求持有巴西 CNPJ 的在地進口商/代表持證，並在 INMETRO 面前承擔法律責任；（3）INMETRO 產品注冊及合規標識；（4）產品須按 127/220 V、60 Hz 電網標定/標誌；（5）PBE/ENCE 能效標籤及 Selo PROCEL（Eletrobras）；（6）無線產品的 ANATEL 型號核准；（7）PNRS 逆向物流義務。海關及物流鏈（經 Santos/Paranaguá 入境、ANTT 監管的公路運輸）由巴西進口商處理。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — INMETRO compulsory certification via accredited OCP, INMETRO registration, and compliance seal required before Brazilian market placement; in-country importer/representative with CNPJ required; ANATEL homologation additionally required for wireless products
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required for residential luminaires under CNCA-C10-01; SRRC type approval additionally required for wireless-enabled luminaires

source.publisher: INMETRO — Instituto Nacional de Metrologia, Qualidade e Tecnologia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] INMETRO certification for LED luminaires requires testing to ABNT NBR IEC standards via an accredited OCP, INMETRO registration, the compliance seal, and a CNPJ-holding in-country importer/representative responsible before INMETRO. INMETRO/OCP and CCC are parallel non-mutual third-party schemes — Chinese CCC evidence does not transfer. Additional Brazil-specific obligations include the 127/220 V 60 Hz design, PBE/ENCE labelling and Selo PROCEL, ANATEL homologation for wireless products, and PNRS reverse-logistics enrolment. Customs entry typically occurs via Santos or Paranaguá through the Brazilian importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] LED 灯具的 INMETRO 认证要求通过经认可的 OCP 按 ABNT NBR IEC 标准检测、进行 INMETRO 注册、加贴合规标识，并由持有 CNPJ 的在地进口商/代表在 INMETRO 面前负责。INMETRO/OCP 与 CCC 为并行的非互认第三方方案——中国 CCC 证据不可转用。额外的巴西特有义务包括 127/220 V 60 Hz 设计、PBE/ENCE 标签及 Selo PROCEL、无线产品的 ANATEL 型号核准，以及 PNRS 逆向物流登记。清关通常经 Santos 或 Paranaguá 由巴西进口商办理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] LED 燈具的 INMETRO 認證要求通過經認可的 OCP 按 ABNT NBR IEC 標準檢測、進行 INMETRO 注冊、加貼合規標識，並由持有 CNPJ 的在地進口商/代表在 INMETRO 面前負責。INMETRO/OCP 與 CCC 為並行的非互認第三方方案——中國 CCC 證據不可轉用。額外的巴西特有義務包括 127/220 V 60 Hz 設計、PBE/ENCE 標籤及 Selo PROCEL、無線產品的 ANATEL 型號核准，以及 PNRS 逆向物流登記。清關通常經 Santos 或 Paranaguá 由巴西進口商辦理。
